reason: Mechanical backtest of the extracted spec (FX 5m AUD/GBP/EUR, 2015-2025): OOS PF 1.01 gross / 0.89 net (0.7-pip cost), WR 38%, ~9,900 trades — below the 1.3 bar and net-negative after realistic spread.
